name: Citrix Systems, Inc.
description: Citrix Systems, Inc. is an American multinational software company that provides server, application and desktop virtualization, networking, software-as-a-service, and cloud computing technologies. The company's solutions enable secure, remote access to applications and desktops from any device over any network, helping organizations empower secure hybrid work. Citrix was acquired by Vista Equity Partners and Evergreen Coast Capital in 2022 and merged into Cloud Software Group.
